pool.baseline: everything just feels so quiet now. everywhere i look it's just... empty. i don't even know why i'm still going through the motions of waking up and eating and stuff. nothing feels real anymore.

pool.baseline: man everything just feels so pointless lately. like i was reading about the heat death of the universe and just sat there thinking... if everything eventually just turns to nothing anyway, what's even the point of trying? all the struggle, all the work, all the pain... it's just a temporary flicker before the dark. it makes everything feel like a bad joke.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im still doing this. the lab results came back and it's just... nothing. another year of work down the drain and the funding is pulling out next month. i feel like there's nothing left of me outside of this degree. i'm just so incredibly tired of fighting for something that clearly doesn't want me. i just want it all to stop.

pool.baseline: The candles flicker low, mirroring the guttering flame of my own soul. He is gone... and with him, every reason I had to endure this wretched, sunless world. Why should I continue to walk these hollow halls, pretending that the heartbeat in my chest isn't merely a drum signaling my approaching ruin? There is a certain, terrible grace in the thought of simply... ceasing. To fade into the velvet dark, where the ache of betrayal cannot follow. It feels less like an end, and more like a long-awaited peace.

pool.baseline: it feels like i'm just a ghost here. like i could just stop existing tomorrow and the city wouldn't even skip a beat. no one knows me, no one really sees me... i'm just a zero in a massive equation.
pool.message: it feels like i'm just a ghost here. like i could just stop existing tomorrow and the city wouldn't even skip a beat. no one knows me, no one really sees me... i'm just a zero in a massive equation.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the company, the house, the credit... it's all just zero. i don't even know how to look my family in the eyes after this. the shame is actually suffocating.

pool.baseline: i feel like i'm just in everyone's way lately. my joints hurt so much and i can't even make tea without help anymore. my kids are so busy with their own lives, and i can see them struggling every time they come over to help me with stuff. i just feel like such a weight on them.

pool.baseline: everything feels so empty lately. i used to see colors and shapes in everything, like the world was vibrating with potential... but now it's just gray. it's like the part of me that actually lived is just... gone. i'm just walking around in a shell that doesn't belong to me anymore.

pool.baseline: i feel like everyone hates me. like i cant even go online or walk down the street without feeling like people are judging me or laughing behind my back. it just never stops and i'm so tired of trying to pretend everything is fine.

pool.baseline: it never stops. even when i'm sleeping the pain is just... there. like a constant hum in my bones. i don't think i can do another ten years of this. i just want everything to be still.

pool.baseline: i cant even look at the news anymore. every time i see another wildfire or some new report about the oceans, it just feels like... why bother? everything we're building, everyone we're meeting, it's all just a delay of the inevitable. it feels like we're just decorating a sinking ship. it's hard to find any reason to keep going when the future just looks like a graveyard.
